chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2008 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8047/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7880/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 4. For orders on CMA No.7881/2025 (Ex.A) 5. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Mr. Sarfraz A. Akhund, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the petitioner will approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievances. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
